name: Chocolate Almond Rum Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and rum over hot water. Cool, do not allow to set.
2. Cream butter and confectioners' sugar until light and fluffy. Gradually add egg yolks and beat well. Transfer mixture to a large bowl. Stir in the melted chocolate and ground almonds. Beat egg whites until firm peaks form. Add extra sugar gradually and beat until dissolved. Gradually fold egg whites and sifted flour into the chocolate mixture. Spread batter into a greased, deep round cake tin lined with greased, grease-proof paper.
3. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 50 minutes. Allow to stand five minutes before turning onto a wire rack to cool.
4. When cooled, spread topping over the top and sides of the cake.
5. Toast flaked almonds in a moderate oven for five minutes and allow to cool. Press toasted flaked almonds around the top and sides of the cake.
6. Icing: Melt chocolate, butter, and rum together over hot water. Stir until smooth. Cool until thick enough to spread.
